name: Oracle of the Sun
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>太</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>陽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>官</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If only your opponent controls a monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Fire Ant Ascator" or "Supay" from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: If only your opponent controls a monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Fire Ant Ascator" or "Supay" from your Deck to your hand.
eff: If only your opponent controls a monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Fire Ant Ascator" or "Supay" from your Deck to your hand.

sets.set: Battle Pack 2: War of the Giants

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
